% check a.php
a.php:15:12: cannot call static method 'bar' via object instance
a.php:16:1: $x is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:19:1: $y is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:25:7: cannot access instance property 'a' statically
a.php:27:7: cannot access static property 'b' via object instance
a.php:29:1: $z is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:32:7: class const Foo::a does not exist
a.php:33:7: class const Foo::b does not exist
a.php:36:1: $m is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:37:6: class property Foo::$c does not exist

% check b.php
b.php:15:5: class property Bar::$counter does not exist


-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	private $a;

	private static string $b;

	static function bar(): string;
	function dynam(): int;
}

$foo = new Foo;

$x = $foo->bar();
#debugType $x

$y = $foo::bar();
#debugType $y

$foo->dynam();
$foo::dynam();

$foo->a;
$foo::$a;

$foo->b;
$z = $foo::$b;
#debugType $z

// Missing constants are reported too.
$foo::a;
$foo::b;

$m = Foo::$b;
#debugType $m
Foo::$c;
-- b.php --
<?php

class Bar
{
	private static $bar;

	public static function init()
	{
		static $counter = 0; // not a class property
	}
}


$b =new Bar;
$b::$counter;
